title: IT Administractor
description:
Main IT administrative duties:

  • Ensure all backup schedules are running

  • Manage and monitor all cybersecurity related infrastructure

  • Manage endpoint devices using RMM.

  • Provide IT support to local and overseas users

  • Work with Global IT on projects and provide local oversight and management of regional initiatives.

  • Collaborate with Global IT to ensure NPI IT standards and practices are aligned locally and in compliance with ITGC standards.

Daily IT tasks:

  • Responding to user support requests

  • Ensure timely resolution of support tickets and tasks to meet KPIs

  • Monitoring and maintaining network infrastructure

  • Setting up VPN for users

  • Managing access to NAS

  • Managing Remote Desktop Services for local users

  • Assist with Technology Refreshes (Hardware, Operating System, Patching and Firmware)

  • Deploy application upgrades and fixes for managed infrastructure.

  • Raise Purchase Requisition and work with Global IT for End-User software needs

  • Asset management of devices

  • Administer network devices (Routers, Printers and Switches) and IT related equipment

HR-related IT tasks (for new hires):

  • Work with HR and Global IT to create email accounts

  • Configure devices for users and set up O365 apps

  • Create user in NAS (or Active Directory) and map shared folders

  • Configure web browsers for remote desktop applications

  • Configure tablets for operators to view the Work instructions / OMS

HR-related IT tasks (for offboarding of terminated employees):

  • Work with HR and Global IT to offboard email and RDS accounts

  • Reset the devices and prepare for reuse

  • Remove access on NAS or Active Directory

Requirements：

  • Knowledge in the following: MS Windows Desktop, Windows Server, Active Directory and Group Policies, Hyper-V and Microsoft 365.

  • Strong experience with system management tools, logical file systems, and client/server environments.

  • A minimum of 3 years' experience supporting a mission-critical IT infrastructure.

  • Ability to communicate technical issues with non-technical people in English and Chinese.

postedCompany.description: NPI SOLUTIONS (SINGAPORE) (PTE.) LTD., was established in May 2010, and expanded in March 2013. The plant brings local support and manufacturing to our customers in the Asia Pacific using our cutting edge technology that ensures fast and reliable service. The expansion is in line with our company's plan to increase our box build footprint and to install cable harness manufacturing and to provide us the leverage and increase our production flow and streamline our warehouse.
postedCompany.name: NPI SOLUTIONS (SINGAPORE) (PTE.) LTD.
